property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.10.7-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.10.7-hotspot\bin;C:\tools\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Microsoft.PowerShell_7.6.0.0_x64__8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SDKs\Azure\CLI2\wbin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\madasi\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\madasi\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\GitHub.Copilot_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\madasi\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\madasi\AppData\Local\Programs\Azure Dev CLI\;C:\Users\madasi\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\madasi\AppData\Local\Programs\modernize\;.

testcase.name: processNotificationEvent_emailFailure_marksAsFailed
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-16T22:13:07.326+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Processing notification event: eventId=evt-123, type=StudentEnrolled, userId=1 2026-04-16T22:13:07.327+01:00 ERROR 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Failed to send email for notificationId=1: SMTP connection refused
java.lang.RuntimeException: SMTP connection refused at org.springframework.mail.MailSender.send(MailSender.java:42) ~[spring-context-support-6.1.6.jar:6.1.6] at com.eduverse.notification.service.NotificationService.sendEmail(NotificationService.java:102) ~[classes/:na] at com.eduverse.notification.service.NotificationService.processNotificationEvent(NotificationService.java:64) ~[classes/:na] at com.eduverse.notification.service.NotificationServiceTest.processNotificationEvent_emailFailure_marksAsFailed(NotificationServiceTest.java:105) ~[test-classes/:na] at testcase.name: processNotificationEvent_inApp_marksAsSentWithoutEmail
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T22:13:07.331+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Processing notification event: eventId=evt-456, type=null, userId=1

testcase.name: sendAdHocEmail_createsNotificationAndSendsEmail
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T22:13:07.337+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Sending ad-hoc email to userId=1, subject='Test Subject' 2026-04-16T22:13:07.337+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Email sent successfully for notificationId=3

testcase.name: processNotificationEvent_createsAndSendsEmail
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T22:13:07.345+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Processing notification event: eventId=evt-123, type=StudentEnrolled, userId=1 2026-04-16T22:13:07.345+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Email sent successfully for notificationId=1

testcase.name: processNotificationEvent_idempotent_duplicateEventId
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T22:13:07.349+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Processing notification event: eventId=evt-123, type=StudentEnrolled, userId=1 2026-04-16T22:13:07.349+01:00 INFO 39620 --- [notification-service] [ main] c.e.n.service.NotificationService : Duplicate event detected, skipping: eventId=evt-123
